prompt: Using the FIRST reference image as the exact structural template for a 3D stylized game UI shop icon (fantasy exchange shop kiosk with a curved arch awning, counter base, hanging lanterns, decorative crystals, a large coin floating in front, a small coin floating above the arch, sparkles around, transparent background, square 1:1 composition) — keep the EXACT SAME composition, perspective, 3D angle, kiosk architecture, proportions, and all decorative elements in the same positions. The shop base/counter: warm wood-brown and gold tones instead of purple-stone. Sparkles around the coin should be warm white/gold. STRICT RULES: NO purple, NO violet, NO silver, NO cool tones anywhere — only gold, amber, warm brown, cream, and small white/cyan highlight sparkles.
